body:
ABTV Beautiful Landscapes is a collection of optimization mods to support running all my texture pack at max settings.

 

 Prepare to elevate your experience with ABVT Medival Pack: Optimized! This modpack not only enhances your performance with smoother framerates and upgraded visuals, but it also introduces exciting quality of life improvements to make your gameplay even more enjoyable. The best part? It's entirely client-side, meaning you can use it on any server without any issues. Don't let lag destroy your gameplay – install ABVT Boosted Pack and experience a superior gameplay experience.

 

This modpack makes it way easier to run all my packs from 64px up to the full 512px ABTV texturepack
The 64px pack is included in this modpack
128-258 and 512px is avalable from my. Patreon page
 

 

Are you looking for a great and easy to run Semi Realistic Texture Pack? If yes, then amazingly you are at the right place at the right moment. aBigTasteofVasten (aBTV) Texture Pack is a medieval-looking realistic texture pack owned by Psiloncraft.com which a very good and compatible texture pack.
Subscribe to the patron for the premium or check the demo below!
 

A Big Taste Of Vasten Texture Pack = aBTV is a Medival looking texture pack for builders
aBTV is NOT Vanilla. and it will never be! therefore you will see different textures and looks of models in this pack.
It supports RTX ray tracing that’s really cool.
It is designed to use with BSL 8.2 shader and newer!
Where can I get aBTV? For the full pack, you have to sub for Patreon to get access to the download. Or join the discord for the free pack.
Supports java 1.13-1.20.4 and will be updated for newer versions.
aBTV texturepack comes in 64 px 128px 256px 512px
Best with BLS Shader 8.1 and latest Optifine but other shaders are supported.
64px - 128px - 256px - 512px and soon to come modded Minecraft texture 
packs avalable on my. Patreon page
